title: Engineering of Fully Humanized and Vascularized 3D Bone Marrow Niches Sustaining Undifferentiated Human Cord Blood Hematopoietic Stem and Progenitor Cells
author: Gordian Born
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Data underlying the figures in the publication “Engineering of fully humanized and vascularized 3D bone marrow niches sustaining undifferentiated human cord blood hematopoietic stem and progenitor cells”, published in  J Tissue Eng.,   2021 , 12, 2041731421044855. 

 DOI:10.1177/20417314211044855 

   

 Table of Contents: 

  1. P12-03_TP01_Suppernatant : Enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay of VEGF concentration in vascularized and not vascularized BM niches. 

  2. P12_WholeNiche : qPCR data of vascular and osteogenic markers in vascularized and not vascularized BM niches. 

  3. FACs-Overview-SN_relativ : FACS data showing haematopoietic cell populations in the supernatant after HSC cocoulture in vascularized and not vascularized BM niches. 

  4. FACs-Overview-niche_Relativ : FACS data showing haematopoietic cell populations in the niche after HSC cocoulture in vascularized and not vascularized BM niches. 

  5. CFU : Colony formation statistics after HSC cocoulture from vascularized and not vascularized BM niches. 

  6. Cell cycle : Cell cycle statistics of HSPCs after HSC cocoulture from vascularized and not vascularized BM niches. 

  7. P12_03_AfterHSPC-vs-BeforeHSPCs : qPCR data of vascular and osteogenic markers in vascularized and not vascularized BM niches after and before HSC cocoulture. 

  8. Scheme : Vector graphic of experimental setup. 

  9. Images engineered niches : Folder containing images of engineered niches.
